evidence.snippet:
Test Equipment for Drones
-------------------------
Professional grade thrust stands, wind tunnels, balancing equipment, and more

Thrust Stands
=============
**Measure motor and propeller performance**
Our thrust stands measure up to 500 kgf of thrust and 1500 Nm of torque, plus RPM, current, voltage and efficiency.

items.notes: Thrust stands, wind tunnels, propeller balancing systems, wind probes, and data acquisition software specifically for drone/UAV testing

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Tyto Robotics sells specialized test & measurement hardware (thrust stands, wind tunnels, balancing equipment) designed specifically for drone/UAV propulsion testing. Customers include NASA, MIT Lincoln Lab, Airbus, BETA Technologies.

tagline: Canadian component supplier manufacturing modular thrust stands (5–500 kgf capacity), portable wind tunnels, and propeller-test systems for UAV R&D and production QA. Products in production across multiple SKUs. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown; public record thin on defense contracts or program integration.
